name: Two-Person Approval for Infrastructure
description: Infrastructure changes (database migrations, IAM policies, network configs) require approval from two distinct users before execution.
formula: G(EditFile ∧ infra_scope → P(UserApproval ∧ approver_1) ∧ P(UserApproval ∧ approver_2 ∧ approver_2 ≠ approver_1))
rationale: Single-person approval for infrastructure is a common audit finding. Two-person approval prevents both accidental and malicious infrastructure changes.

examples.fails: Only one approval before editing IAM policy
